name: Local TTS
description: Governed local text-to-speech wrapper over Hub local model execution for generic audio synthesis tasks.
governed_dispatch_notes: Routes through XT run_local_task with task_kind=text_to_speech.
If model_id/preferred_model_id is omitted, XT binds the best runnable Hub local TTS model for this task kind.
Use supervisor-voice for the dedicated Supervisor playback surface; use this wrapper for generic local audio synthesis.
install_hint: Publish and sign this wrapper into the official dist before recommending Hub pinning; until then treat it as source-present only.
